name: HackTool - NoFilter Execution
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Stamatis Chatzimangou (st0pp3r)
SIGMA Title: HackTool - NoFilter Execution
SIGMA Description: Detects execution of NoFilter, a tool for abusing the Windows Filtering Platform for privilege escalation via hardcoded policy name indicators


False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (("Event ID"=5447 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ronpolicy%') OR ("Event ID"=5449 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ronpolicy%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY HackTool - NoFilter Execution on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (("Event ID"=5447 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ronpolicy%') OR ("Event ID"=5449 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ronpolicy%')) AQL filter query
